name: developer-portfolio
description: Static developer portfolio (GitHub Pages) with a Git-based CMS (Decap CMS)

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run copy && npm run optimize:images && npm run build:content && npm run build:css
scripts.dev: npm run clean && npm run copy && npm run optimize:images && npm run build:content && concurrently -n css,serve -c cyan,green "npm:watch:css" "npm:preview"
